roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, resumable update controller, payment callbacks, report outbox and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer order/service UI, reseller web dashboard and PasarGuard service lifecycle
roles.processor: advanced schedules, auto-renewal, service health, reseller tiers, backups, campaigns and background reports

core: PROCESSOR_WORKER (optional for direct Cloudflare deployment fallback)

features: fixes UNIQUE collisions when an open system_error_center row is changed to resolved while an older resolved row already exists
uses a transactional D1 batch with INSERT OR IGNORE plus conditional increment for error recording across historical schemas
detects same-version releases by release_id and SHA-256 instead of relying only on the numeric version
compares Edge and Processor SHA-256 values so panel and background Worker code is actually synchronized
changes automatic deployment into resumable Edge, Processor and Core stages so one slow Worker cannot permanently block Core
continues deployment from ZIP upload, every Cron phase and eligible panel/admin requests
allows direct Cloudflare deployment by stored or discoverable script name even when a runtime service binding is temporarily unavailable
reduces runtime verification waits after an accepted Cloudflare upload receipt
keeps all previous gift-plan Persian RTL, service deletion, reports, billing and live-usage features

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload the ZIP through the central bot; the uploader commits to GitHub and advances up to four resumable deployment stages
deployment.recovery: unfinished stages resume on Cron and when the panel/admin interface is opened
deployment.db_schema_revision: 3.3.5 (unchanged; runtime-safe error-center repair requires no manual SQL)
deployment.cron: automatic update check now runs on every scheduled invocation with a D1 claim throttle
deployment.error_center_write: single transactional batch; resolution deletes stale resolved duplicates before status transition

validation.error_resolution_collision_reproduction: passed; old UPDATE reproduced SQLITE_CONSTRAINT_UNIQUE and new delete-plus-update completed
validation.concurrent_error_counter: passed with 50 writers producing one open row and occurrence_count=50

limitations: production Cloudflare, Telegram, GitHub and PasarGuard calls were not executed without account credentials
